name: opencairn
description: Self-hostable, multi-LLM knowledge OS for individuals and teams.

scripts.check:types: pnpm --filter @opencairn/shared exec tsc --noEmit --project tsconfig.json --pretty false && pnpm --filter @opencairn/db exec tsc --noEmit --project tsconfig.json --pretty false && pnpm --filter @opencairn/api exec tsc --noEmit --project tsconfig.json --pretty false && pnpm --filter @opencairn/hocuspocus exec tsc --noEmit --project tsconfig.json --pretty false && pnpm --dir apps/web exec tsc --noEmit --project tsconfig.json --pretty false
scripts.check:unit:fast: pnpm --filter @opencairn/shared test && pnpm --filter @opencairn/emails test && pnpm --filter @opencairn/templates test
scripts.check:public: pnpm docs:check && pnpm check:health && pnpm check:secrets && pnpm --filter @opencairn/web i18n:parity && pnpm check:types && pnpm check:unit:fast
scripts.dev:docker:reset: docker compose --profile app --profile worker --profile hocuspocus --profile ollama down -v
